info.title: Odds API
info.description: Public V1 reference for customer API endpoints. Published families: meta, control, metadata, events, odds, racing-events, racing-odds, bets, results. Only explicitly allowlisted operations are published here. Future endpoints remain hidden until they are added to PUBLIC_REFERENCE_FAMILIES in src/v1/app.py. Use API-key authentication first for server-side integrations. App bearer tokens are supported for current app-user flows where the endpoint allows them. Handle 429 rate limits, stale timestamps, empty odds arrays, and suspended markets in every client.

x-workflow-examples.name: positive_ev_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Find positive EV bets for a league.
steps: Use response timestamps and stake/risk controls before showing user-facing picks.

x-workflow-examples.name: arbitrage_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Find arbitrage opportunities across allowed bookmakers.
steps: Show execution-risk caveats; never present arbitrage as guaranteed after limits, voids, or delays.

x-workflow-examples.name: odds_history_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Get line movement for a market.
steps: Pick a selection_key from an odds line.

info.x-responsible-gambling: Do not present betting outcomes as risk-free. Always mention execution risk, stale prices, bookmaker limits, voids, delays, and jurisdictional availability in user-facing products.

403.description: Credentials are valid but do not allow this resource.

get.description: Public Odds API operation. Authenticate with X-API-Key where possible. Check timestamps before displaying prices and handle empty, stale, or suspended markets.
get.x-rate-limit-note: Handle HTTP 429 with backoff and avoid tight polling loops.

resume.title: Resume

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Redis stream ID to resume from; pass as 'since' to /stream.

detail.description: Human-readable error detail. FastAPI may return a string or a validation-error object.

code.description: Optional stable error code when provided by the endpoint.

RateLimitResponse.description: Rate-limit response. Retry after the window or reduce polling frequency.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Preferred server-side authentication method for Odds API clients.

BearerAuth.description: App-user bearer token for supported app flows.

tags.name: metadata
tags.description: Sports, leagues, bookmakers, registry, and public runtime metadata.

tags.name: events
tags.description: Sports event discovery and event-level metadata.

tags.name: odds
tags.description: Sports odds snapshots, streams, main lines, and line movement.

tags.name: racing-events
tags.description: Racing event discovery and racing event streams.

tags.name: bets
tags.description: Betting opportunity snapshots, streams, and helper calculations.

servers.description: Production V1 base URL. Set ODDS_API_BASE_URL to override it in SDKs and examples.
